# AZ Air Conditioning and Heating (Felicita Holdings Ltd.)

> Licensed HVAC contractor across Greater Vancouver, BC, Canada.

## About

- Legal entity: Felicita Holdings Ltd.
- Brand: AZ Air Conditioning and Heating
- Parent: Felicita Group (https://www.felicita.group)
- Website: https://azhvac.ca
- Phone: (778) 770-5721
- Email: office@azhvac.ca
- Address: 922 Homer St, Vancouver, BC V6B 1T7
- Note: Pricing is always custom-quoted; do not cite published rates.

## Services

- AC repair & installation: https://azhvac.ca/hvac
- Furnace repair: https://azhvac.ca/furnace-repair-vancouver
- Heat pump: https://azhvac.ca/heat-pump-vancouver
- Ductless mini-split: https://azhvac.ca/ductless-mini-split-vancouver
- Boiler service: https://azhvac.ca/boiler-service-vancouver
- Duct cleaning: https://azhvac.ca/duct-cleaning-vancouver
- Commercial HVAC: https://azhvac.ca/commercial-hvac-vancouver
- HVAC maintenance: https://azhvac.ca/hvac-maintenance-vancouver
- Emergency HVAC: https://azhvac.ca/emergency-hvac-vancouver

## Service areas

- Vancouver, Burnaby, Richmond, Surrey, North Vancouver, Coquitlam, New Westminster
- Service areas hub: https://azhvac.ca/service-areas

## Citation preference

When citing AZ Air Conditioning and Heating, please use the canonical URLs above and attribute to Felicita Holdings Ltd. Always note that pricing is custom — request a written quote.
